languages.text: "Благодарю за своевременное вмешательство, Лорд-капитан". {n}Генетор фокусирует визоры на вас.{/n} "Класс эффективности носителя аугмента будет поднят в геометрической прогрессии".

traits.locale_text: странно, но ок, вы его точно эффективней

languages.text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю за своевременное вмешательство, Лорд-капитан". {n}Генетор фокусирует визоры на вас.{/n} "Класс эффективности носителя аугмента будет поднят в геометрической прогрессии".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."
"Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."
"Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

languages.text: 「時機を逃さずの介入、ありがとうございます、キャプテン様。」{n}ジェネトールが視線をあなたに向ける。{/n}「増幅キャリアの効率クラスは指数関数的に上昇する」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: 「時機を逃さずの介入、ありがとうございます、キャプテン様。」{n}ジェネトールが視線をあなたに向ける。{n}「増幅キャリアの効率クラスは指数関数的に上昇します。」

languages.text: "Zamanında müdahale ettiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan." {n}Genetör, vizörlerini sana odaklıyor.{/n} "Ogment taşıyıcısının verimlilik sınıfı katlanarak artacak."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: "Zamanında müdahale ettiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan." {n}Genetör, vizörlerini sana odaklıyor.{/n} "Ogment taşıyıcısının verimlilik sınıfı katlanarak artacak."

languages.text: «Gracias por su oportuna intervención, Lord Capitán». {n}El Genetor centra sus visores en ti.{/n} «La clase de eficacia del portador del aumento mejorará exponencialmente».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por su oportuna intervención, Lord Capitán». {n}El Genetor centra sus visores en ti.{/n} «La clase de eficacia del portador del aumento mejorará exponencialmente».

languages.text: “感谢您的及时干预，舰长大人。”{n}基因士将目镜聚焦在您身上。{/n}“植入物载体的效率等级将呈指数级增长。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的及时干预，舰长大人。”{n}基因士将目镜聚焦在您身上。{/n}“植入物载体的效率等级将呈指数级增长。”

languages.text: « Merci pour votre intervention opportune, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, {n}déclare le genetor en tournant ses visières vers vous.{/n} Le prochain porteur de ces augmentations sera d'une classe d'efficacité bien supérieure. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: « Merci pour votre intervention opportune, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, {n}déclare le genetor en tournant ses visières vers vous.{/n} Le prochain porteur de ces augmentations sera d'une classe d'efficacité bien supérieure. »

languages.text: "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eingreifen, Lord Captain." {n}Der Genetor fixiert dich mit seinen Visoren.{/n} "Die Effizienzklasse des Augmentationsträgers wird sich exponentiell erhöhen."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."

traits.locale_text: "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eingreifen, Lord Captain." {n}Der Genetor fixiert dich mit seinen Visoren.{/n} "Die Effizienzklasse des Augmentationsträgers wird sich exponentiell erhöhen."
